name: Tap Transportation Inc
recent_news: Yellow Pages listing for Tap Transportation Inc at 1981 E Westchester Dr, Chandler, AZ marks the business as CLOSED; no current operating signals found. A separate 'Tap Transportation LLC' carrier (USDOT 4379926) exists but is not clearly the same entity.
fit_notes: Likely defunct micro NEMT/special-needs van operator out of a residential address; not an independent school-bus contractor. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate.

name: United Special Transportation
recent_news: Only a Yellow Pages-style listing under San Antonio special-needs transportation tied to phone (210) 670-1838; no website, no district-contract references, no news flow. Not visible in Texas Medicaid NEMT vendor coverage.
fit_notes: Micro special-needs/NEMT van operation; no evidence of yellow-bus fleet or school-district contracts. Below Summit tuck-in threshold.

name: Round-A-Bout Transportation Co
recent_news: BBB profile (Asheville) lists business as 'out of business'; founded 7/1/2011; classified as Medical Transportation, not student transportation. Lead-exec field (Ronald Cohen) does not match BBB principals (Stevenson family).
fit_notes: Defunct NEMT operator, not a school-bus contractor; no Summit tuck-in fit.

name: Acme Transportation Corp
recent_news: Manta/SIC listings describe Acme Transportation Corp (Ypsilanti) as a Local & Suburban Transit / Other Urban Transit operator (NAICS 485119) serving riders with medical restrictions; very small (~4 employees per Manta, ~$292K revenue). A same-name 'ACME TRANSPORTATION COMPANY' (USDOT 1672019) is an active general-freight carrier with 18 power units / 19 drivers - a different business line, not student transport.
fit_notes: Micro handicap/special-needs van operator (not a yellow-bus contractor); no district contracts found. Below Summit tuck-in scale; possible future bolt-on only if larger SPED contract relationships exist.

name: Care On Wheels Trnsprtn Svc
recent_news: Care On Wheels Transportation Services LLC (13112 W Warren Ave, Dearborn, MI) is registered as Non-emergency Medical Transport (VAN) NPI 1750690715 and holds GSA contract 47QMCB25D0004; operates ~3 Detroit-area locations. No evidence of school-district student transportation contracts.
fit_notes: NEMT van service - not a school-bus contractor; outside Summit's student-transport tuck-in thesis.
